name: an ungrounded convention rule is still declined after the EO catalog import
command:
printf %s 'resource "x" "y" {
  image = "repo@sha256:abc"
  provenance = true
  scan = "trivy"
}
' > green.tf
printf %s '- id: bogus
  source_id: not-a-real-source
  kind: patterning
  mode: require
  token: "x"
  message: "m"
' > bogus.yaml
bash $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/cloud-conventions.sh --tool terraform --iac green.tf --ruleset bogus.yaml
